desc.en:
镇江城市轨道交通为中华人民共和国江苏省镇江市的城市轨道交通系统。已经通车的有宁句城际镇江（句容）段，据交通运输部数据，1月份，镇江共有1条城市轨道交通线路，运营里程为17.3公里
Zhenjiang Urban Rail Transit is the urban rail transit system of Zhenjiang City, Jiangsu Province, China. The currently operational line is the Ningju Intercity Rail Zhenjiang (Jurong) Section. According to data from the Ministry of Transport, as of January, Zhenjiang has one urban rail transit line with an operating mileage of 17.3 kilometers
